units.source_text: 風險調整乃反映承擔非財務風險所產⽣⽇後現⾦流⾦額和時間不確定性所需的補償，按⼀年期間第75個百分位的壓⼒⽔平計算。壓⼒⽔平乃參考外

units.source_text: – 遞延獎勵通常要求僱員在實際授出期內仍然受僱，於授出⽇期後⼀般不受表現條件所限。唯⻑期獎勵則受表現條件規限。
units.translation_target_text: – Deferred awards usually require employees to remain employed during the actual grant period and are generally not subject to performance conditions after the grant date. Period-only rewards are subject to performance conditions.
units.translation_en: – Deferred awards usually require employees to remain employed during the actual grant period and are generally not subject to performance conditions after the grant date. Period-only rewards are subject to performance conditions.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – Deferred awards usually require employees to remain employed during the actual grant period and are generally not subject to performance conditions after the grant date. Period-only rewards are subject to performance conditions.

units.source_text: – 遞延股份獎勵⼀般於三年、四年、五年或七年內實際授出。
units.translation_target_text: – Deferred share awards generally vest within three, four, five or seven years.
units.translation_en: – Deferred share awards generally vest within three, four, five or seven years.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – Deferred share awards generally vest within three, four, five or seven years.

units.source_text: – 已實際授出股份可能受實際授出後之禁售規定約束。
units.translation_target_text: – Shares actually granted may be subject to post-grant lock-up provisions.
units.translation_en: – Shares actually granted may be subject to post-grant lock-up provisions.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – Shares actually granted may be subject to post-grant lock-up provisions.

units.source_text: – 獎勵⼀般須受扣減及撤回條款規限。
units.translation_target_text: – Awards are generally subject to deduction and withdrawal terms.
units.translation_en: – Awards are generally subject to deduction and withdrawal terms.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – Awards are generally subject to deduction and withdrawal terms.

units.translation_target_text: – Long-term rewards are subject to performance conditions.

units.source_text: – 每個季度於市場購買價值最⾼750英鎊或所屬地區貨幣等值的股份。
units.translation_target_text: – Purchase shares on the market every quarter worth up to £750 or the local currency equivalent.
units.translation_en: – Purchase shares on the market every quarter worth up to £750 or the local currency equivalent.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – Purchase shares on the market every quarter worth up to £750 or the local currency equivalent.

units.source_text: – 按每三股已購股份，免費配贈⼀股，作為配贈獎勵。中國內地配贈獎勵以現⾦結算。
units.translation_target_text: – For every three shares purchased, one share will be given free of charge as a bonus. Compensation awards in Mainland China will be settled in cash.
units.translation_en: – For every three shares purchased, one share will be given free of charge as a bonus. Compensation awards in Mainland China will be settled in cash.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – For every three shares purchased, one share will be given free of charge as a bonus. Compensation awards in Mainland China will be settled in cash.

units.source_text: – 配贈獎勵實際授出的條件是僱員須繼續受聘，⽽購入股份的禁售期最⻑為兩年九個⽉。
units.translation_target_text: – Matching awards are actually granted subject to the employee’s continued employment and the lock-up period for the purchased shares is a maximum of two years and nine months.
units.translation_en: – Matching awards are actually granted subject to the employee’s continued employment and the lock-up period for the purchased shares is a maximum of two years and nine months.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – Matching awards are actually granted subject to the employee’s continued employment and the lock-up period for the purchased shares is a maximum of two years and nine months.

units.source_text: – ⾃2014年起，英國計劃的合資格僱員可每⽉儲蓄最多500英鎊，附有可使⽤儲蓄款項購買股份之認股權。
units.translation_target_text: – Since 2014, eligible employees in the UK scheme can save up to £500 per month, with options to purchase shares using the savings.

units.source_text: – 認股權通常於三年期或五年期合約開始後分別於第三周年或第五周年後六個⽉內可予⾏使。
units.translation_target_text: – Share options are usually exercisable within six months of the third or fifth anniversary respectively after the commencement of a three-year or five-year contract.
